name: burrow-proxy-module
description: src/proxy/server.ts implements startProxy(opts: StartProxyOptions): Promise<ProxyHandle>. Uses node:http createServer + 'connect' event for HTTPS CONNECT tunneling and 'request' event for plain HTTP forwarding. matchAllowedDomain(host, allowed) does case-insensitive exact + subdomain matching. ProxyHandle exposes deniedCount/allowedCount counters for tests + observability. stop() destroys tracked sockets first to keep teardown bounded (closeAllConnections triggers ERR_SERVER_NOT_RUNNING in some Bun builds, hence the manual socket set).
